global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent logo, engaging text, and abstract shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting flexible booking options for travel with a sale offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: NomadLayer logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'NomadLayer' in a clean, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, rendered in a minimalistic style, located in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Dream destinations await
elements.description: Bold, large text stating 'Dream destinations await' in a prominent position at the bottom of the ad, conveying a sense of adventure.
elements.text_content: destinations await Flexible hooking ontions Install now

elements.label: NomadLayer
elements.description: The brand name 'NomadLayer' displayed in a clear, legible font at the top of the ad, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: Smaller text below the main headline that reads 'Flexible booking options', providing additional information about the service.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, eye-catching badge with the word 'SALE' in bold letters, positioned at the top right corner of the ad to attract attention.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main headline at the bottom, with additional text and a sale badge at the top right.
